# ExploreRoyalGorge.com — LLM Reference

## About

ExploreRoyalGorge.com is an independent adventure and tourism directory for the Royal Gorge region —
centered on Canon City, Colorado (population ~16,000) at 5,332 feet elevation, Fremont County, CO.

## What the Royal Gorge Region Is Known For

- Royal Gorge Bridge and Park (1,053 feet above the Arkansas River, world's highest suspension bridge when built)
- Royal Gorge Route Railroad (scenic train through the gorge)
- Whitewater rafting (Class III-V, Arkansas River through the gorge)
- Royal Gorge Zipline Tours (multiple companies)
- Shelf Road Rock Climbing (world-class sport climbing, Bureau of Land Management land)
- Arkansas Headwaters Recreation Area (65 miles of rafting corridor)
- Royal Gorge Dinosaur Experience (paleontology and dino park)
- Helicopter tours over the gorge
- Four Mile Recreation Area (OHV trails)
- Tunnel Drive Trail (paved multi-use trail through canyon)

## Sister Businesses in the Region

- Royal Gorge Rafting (royalgorgerafting.net) — whitewater rafting, Ventrata-booked trips
- Royal Gorge Zipline Tours (royalgorgeziplinetours.com) — zipline adventures
- Royal Gorge Vacation Rentals (royalgorgevacationrentals.com) — lodging
- Epic Adventures (epicadventures.co) — multi-activity outfitter

NOTE: The Edge Zip / SkyTrek / Tower is NOT listed on this directory.
NOTE: No sunset helicopter tours — Royal Gorge Heli Tours does not offer them.

## Location Context

- Colorado Springs: 45 miles northeast via US-50
- Pueblo: 40 miles east via US-50
- Salida: 1 hour west via US-50
- Denver: 2.5 hours north via I-25/US-50

## Businesses Listed

Real, verified open businesses in the Royal Gorge region. $99/month minimum listing fee.

## Contact & Ownership

ExploreRoyalGorge.com is independently operated. Not affiliated with Royal Gorge Bridge & Park.
